metadata.title: Calendar Period Week Notes
metadata.description: Calendar Period Week Notes Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Customize the format for each calendar event. Use these placeholders:
ast.target: 自定义每个日历事件的格式。使用以下占位符：

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: Are you sure you want to reset all task group icons?
ast.target: 您确定要重置所有任务组图标吗？

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: This will recalculate scores for every day in your vault's history. It may take a few seconds. Continue?
ast.target: 这将重新计算您保险库历史中每一天的分数。可能需要几秒钟。继续吗？

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: Are you sure you want to reset all vacation history? All days will be treated as normal working days on the next rebuild.
ast.target: 您确定要重置所有假期历史记录吗？下次重建时，所有天数将被视为正常工作日。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Heatmap widget rendered without a widgetKey:
ast.target: 热力图小部件在没有 widgetKey 的情况下渲染：

ast.name: error
ast.source: A detailed ICS parsing error occurred:
ast.target: 发生详细的 ICS 解析错误：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Weekly Note Error: Invalid dateInfo object received.
ast.target: 每周笔记错误：收到无效的 dateInfo 对象。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 调用 Tasks getTasks() 时出错

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to parse color for gradient:

ast.name: error
ast.target: 解析设置 JSON 失败：

ast.name: log
ast.target: 后台运行时日期已更改。正在刷新...

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name that is displayed above the widget. Leave blank to not display a name.
ast.target: 显示在小部件上方的名称。留空则不显示名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the selected date range will be shown in the widget name.
ast.target: 如果启用，所选的日期范围将显示在小部件名称中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the global setting and choose if this widget shows a name.
ast.target: 覆盖全局设置，选择此小部件是否显示名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the global setting and choose if this widget shows a toggle chevron.
ast.target: 覆盖全局设置，选择此小部件是否显示切换箭头。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the type of chart to display. Note for the KPI stat, only one metric is supported. Any additional metrics will be ignored.
ast.target: 选择要显示的图表类型。注意，对于 KPI 统计，仅支持一个指标。任何额外的指标将被忽略。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle which priorities to include in the count. If none are active, all priorities are included.
ast.target: 切换要包含在计数中的优先级。如果未激活任何优先级，则包含所有优先级。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select an icon to display next to the kpi count.
ast.target: 选择一个图标显示在 KPI 计数旁边。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter any Lucide icon name to override the dropdown selection. Leave blank to use dropdown.
ast.target: 输入任何 Lucide 图标名称以覆盖下拉选择。留空则使用下拉菜单。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adds a vertical line to indicate the current day.
ast.target: 添加一条垂直线以指示当前日期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adds a dotted line to the chart showing the cumulative total of completed and upcoming due tasks. Enable this when you have have a date range that includes future dates.
ast.target: 向图表添加一条虚线，显示已完成和即将到来的到期任务的累计总数。当您的日期范围包含未来日期时启用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The label for the projected line in the chart legend.
ast.target: 图表图例中预测线的标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle the visibility of the chart legend. Note for the KPI stat, the legend is always hidden.
ast.target: 切换图表图例的可见性。注意，对于 KPI 统计，图例始终隐藏。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to group the data points on the chart. Note the group data by does not apply to pie chart or kpi stat widgets.
ast.target: 选择如何对图表上的数据点进行分组。注意，分组数据不适用于饼图或 KPI 统计小部件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter tags to include. Prefix with "-" to exclude a tag. Leave blank for all tags. e.g., #work, -#personal
ast.target: 输入要包含的标签。以 \"-\" 为前缀以排除标签。留空则包含所有标签。例如，#work, -#personal

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select a predefined range or a custom period. Note if the metric selected is 'Someday', the date range will not apply.
ast.target: 选择一个预定义范围或自定义时间段。注意，如果选择的指标是 'Someday'，则日期范围不适用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 选择一个固定的开始日期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select 'Today', 'Look forward' or 'Auto look ahead'. For 'Look forward' a number of options to set an end date for the chart will be available. For 'Auto look ahead' the chart will auto end at the last date in the dataset plus 2 weeks.
ast.target: 选择 'Today'、'Look forward' 或 'Auto look ahead'。对于 'Look forward'，将提供多个选项来设置图表的结束日期。对于 'Auto look ahead'，图表将自动结束于数据集中的最后日期加两周。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Look forward from the fixed start date or from the current rolling date.
ast.target: 从固定的开始日期或当前的滚动日期向前看。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter a name for this section
ast.target: 为此部分输入一个名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose an icon for this section
ast.target: 为此部分选择一个图标

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the alignment of the section header text and icon
ast.target: 选择章节标题文本和图标的对齐方式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you change a folder location, #tags or goal values, it's recommended to perform a 'Reset cache' to recalculate your progress.
ast.target: 如果您更改了文件夹位置、#标签或目标值，建议执行 '重置缓存' 以重新计算您的进度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 例如，\"晨间写作\" 或 \"每日任务\"

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Core goals cannot change their type.
ast.target: 核心目标无法更改其类型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only count tasks with this tag (e.g., #gym). Leave blank for all tasks.
ast.target: 仅计算带有此标签的任务（例如，#gym）。留空则计算所有任务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Leave blank to use your default Daily Notes folder and note title, or specify a folder and title.
ast.target: 留空则使用您的默认每日笔记文件夹和笔记标题，或指定一个文件夹和标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the date format used for the file name.
ast.target: 输入用于文件名的日期格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Points and penalties only apply on these days.
ast.target: 积分和惩罚仅适用于这些天。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, missed days for this goal give no penalties.
ast.target: 启用后，此目标的错过天数不会受到惩罚。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Points are calculated automatically based on your target.
ast.target: 积分根据您的目标自动计算。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tint the checkbox border based on task priority
ast.target: 根据任务优先级为复选框边框着色

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Font size for the main 'Month Year' title at the top of the calendar. Default is 22px.
ast.target: 日历顶部主要 '月份 年份' 标题的字体大小。默认为 22px。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggles bold font weight for the month part of the title.
ast.target: 切换标题中月份部分的粗体字重。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggles bold font weight for the year part of the title.
ast.target: 切换标题中年份部分的粗体字重。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggles bold font weight for the day names row (Mon, Tue, etc.).
ast.target: 切换日期名称行（周一、周二等）的粗体字重。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose between a spacious, normal or condensed layout for the calendar grid.
ast.target: 为日历网格选择宽敞、正常或紧凑的布局。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Font size for calendar day lables and week, period/week columns. Default is 12px.
ast.target: 日历日期标签和周、周期/周列的字体大小。默认为12px。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Font size for the day numbers in the calendar grid. Default is 15px.
ast.target: 日历网格中日期数字的字体大小。默认为15px。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggles the visibility of border lines around each date cell.
ast.target: 切换每个日期单元格周围边框线的可见性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Width of the gap/border between calendar cells. The grid lines setting above needs to be toggled on. (e.g., 1px, 2px, 0.5px). Default is 1px.
ast.target: 日历单元格之间间隙/边框的宽度。需要启用上方的网格线设置。（例如，1px、2px、0.5px）。默认为1px。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to indicate the current day on the calendar.
ast.target: 选择如何在日历上指示当天。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adjust the size of the 'today' highlight circle.
ast.target: 调整“今天”高亮圆圈的大小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Colors the day column header (Sun, Mon, etc.) containing today.
ast.target: 为包含今天日期的星期列标题（星期日、星期一等）着色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Colors the Period/Week or Calendar Week number for the current week.
ast.target: 为当前周的周期/周或日历周数着色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggles bold font weight for the Period/Week column.
ast.target: 切换周期/周列的粗体字重。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display a vertical line between the week columns and the date grid.
ast.target: 在周列和日期网格之间显示一条垂直线。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of previous months / years to load before the current month in vertical view.
ast.target: 在垂直视图中，当前月份之前要加载的前几个月/年数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of future months / years to load after the current month in vertical view.
ast.target: 在垂直视图中，当前月份之后要加载的未来几个月/年数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether the calendar week starts on Sunday or Monday.
ast.target: 选择日历周是从星期日还是星期一开始。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the display format for the P/W column.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show or hide the Period/Week column on the left side of the calendar.
ast.target: 在日历左侧显示或隐藏周期/周列。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display a column for week numbers on the left side of the calendar.
ast.target: 在日历左侧显示一个周数列。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The text to display at the top of the week number column.
ast.target: 在周数列顶部显示的文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the folder where your daily notes are stored and created.
ast.target: 指定存储和创建每日笔记的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Highlights the entire week's row when hovering over the P/W label.
ast.target: 当鼠标悬停在P/W标签上时，高亮显示整周的行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Highlights the entire day's column when hovering over the day name (e.g., Mon).
ast.target: 当鼠标悬停在星期名称（例如，星期一）上时，高亮显示整天的列。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When hovering a date, highlights all cells in its row and column up to that date.
ast.target: 当鼠标悬停在某个日期上时，高亮显示该日期所在行和列中直到该日期的所有单元格。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keeps the entire row for the current week permanently highlighted.
ast.target: 保持当前周的整行永久高亮显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shade Saturday and Sunday columns with a subtle background color.
ast.target: 用柔和的背景色为星期六和星期日的列着色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Integrate an external .ics feed calendar URL (e.g., from Google Calendar using the 'Secret address in iCal format' or 'Public address in iCal Format') to indicate events as dots in the calendar grid and event details in the date popup box.
ast.target: 集成一个外部.ics日历订阅URL（例如，来自Google日历的“iCal格式的密钥地址”或“iCal格式的公共地址”），以在日历网格中以点的形式指示事件，并在日期弹出框中显示事件详情。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How often the external calendar URL should be automatically refreshed in the background.
ast.target: 后台自动刷新外部日历URL的频率。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long to wait before showing the note list popup on hover. Default is 800.
ast.target: 在悬停时显示笔记列表弹出窗口前的等待时间。默认为800。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long to wait before hiding the popup after the mouse leaves. Default is 50.
ast.target: 鼠标离开后隐藏弹出窗口前的等待时间。默认为50。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The gap (in pixels) between a calendar day and its popup list. Can be negative. Default is -2.
ast.target: 日历日期与其弹出列表之间的间隙（以像素为单位）。可以为负值。默认为-2。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The font size for the note names inside the calendar popup. Default is 14px.
ast.target: 日历弹出窗口内笔记名称的字体大小。默认为14px。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how popups appear in the Notes and Assets tabs: on hover, or on right-click (which corresponds to a long-press on mobile).
ast.target: 选择在笔记和资源标签页中弹出窗口的出现方式：悬停时，或右键单击时（对应于移动设备上的长按）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a dot on days where any note (that is not a daily note) was created.
ast.target: 在创建了任何笔记（非每日笔记）的日期上显示一个点。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a dot on days where any note (that is not a daily note) was modified.
ast.target: 在修改了任何笔记（非每日笔记）的日期上显示一个点。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a dot on days where an asset (image, PDF, etc.) was added to the vault.
ast.target: 在向保险库添加了资源（图片、PDF等）的日期上显示一个点。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a dot on days that have a calendard event from an external calendar source, e.g. Google Calendar.
ast.target: 在有来自外部日历源（例如Google日历）的日历事件的日期上显示一个点。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The size (in pixels) of the colored dots that appear under calendar days. Default is 4.
ast.target: 日历日期下方出现的彩色点的大小（以像素为单位）。默认为4。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable clicking on week numbers to open/create weekly notes and show the dot indicator.
ast.target: 启用点击周数以打开/创建周记并显示点指示器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder where your weekly notes are stored. It will be created if it doesn't exist.
ast.target: 存储周记的文件夹。如果不存在，将创建它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a dot in the week number column if a note for that week exists.
ast.target: 如果该周存在笔记，则在周数列中显示一个点。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to indicate days with tasks on the calendar grid.
ast.target: 选择如何在日历网格上指示有任务的日期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a single dot on days with tasks. This can be used with or instead of the heatmap/badge.
ast.target: 在有任务的日期上显示一个点。这可以与热力图/徽章一起使用或替代使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The font size for the number inside the task badge. Default is 11px.
ast.target: 任务徽章内数字的字体大小。默认为11px。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Width of the border around the day heatmap content area (e.g., 1px, 2px, 3px). Creates visual separation inside cells. Default is 1px.
ast.target: 日期热力图内容区域周围的边框宽度（例如，1px、2px、3px）。在单元格内创建视觉分隔。默认为1px。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The number of tasks that should have the exact 'Mid' color. Default is 5.
ast.target: 应具有精确“中间”颜色的任务数量。默认为5。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The number of tasks that should have the exact 'End' color. Any day with more tasks will also use the end color. Default is 10.
ast.target: 应具有精确“结束”颜色的任务数量。任何任务更多的日期也将使用结束颜色。默认为10。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how tab names are displayed in the desktop client.
ast.target: 选择桌面客户端中标签页名称的显示方式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a different, often more compact, display style for smaller mobile / tablet screens.
ast.target: 为较小的移动/平板屏幕选择不同的、通常更紧凑的显示样式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Font size for the tab titles (Scratchpad, Notes, Tasks). Default is 15px.
ast.target: 标签页标题（便签本、笔记、任务）的字体大小。默认为15px。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggles bold font weight for the tab titles.
ast.target: 切换标签页标题的粗体字重。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Drag and drop the tabs to set their display order.
ast.target: 拖放标签页以设置它们的显示顺序。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What to do when the Scratchpad tab is clicked while it's already active.
ast.target: 当便签本标签页已处于活动状态时点击它时执行的操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The full path to the note that the Scratchpad tab will read from and write to.
ast.target: 便签本标签页将读取和写入的笔记的完整路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the button to toggle between plain text editing and a rendered Markdown preview.
ast.target: 显示用于在纯文本编辑和渲染的Markdown预览之间切换的按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the button in the scratchpad area to quickly add a new task.
ast.target: 在便签本区域显示用于快速添加新任务的按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the frontmatter properties text (text between ---) at the top of the note will be hidden from the Scratchpad view.
ast.target: 如果启用，笔记顶部的frontmatter属性文本（---之间的文本）将在便签本视图中隐藏。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Font size for the text inside the Scratchpad editor. Default is 14px.
ast.target: 便签本编辑器内文本的字体大小。默认为14px。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggles bold font weight for the text in the Scratchpad.
ast.target: 切换便签本中文本的粗体字重。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Examples: monospace, Arial, 'Courier New'. Leave blank to use the editor default.
ast.target: 示例：monospace、Arial、'Courier New'。留空则使用编辑器默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to open notes when clicked from the notes list. NOTE: Holding the shift key and clicking a note will always open it in a new tab.
ast.target: 选择从笔记列表点击时如何打开笔记。注意：按住Shift键并点击笔记将始终在新标签页中打开它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How many days back the Notes tab should look for created or modified notes. Default is 120.
ast.target: 笔记标签页应查找创建或修改笔记的回溯天数。默认为120。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a colored dot next to each note, indicating if it was recently created or modified.
ast.target: 在每个笔记旁边显示一个彩色点，指示它是否是最近创建或修改的。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a detailed tooltip on hover, containing note path, dates, size, and tags.
ast.target: 在悬停时显示详细工具提示，包含笔记路径、日期、大小和标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Font size for note titles in the list. Default is 14px.
ast.target: 列表中笔记标题的字体大小。默认为14px。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggles bold font weight for note titles in the list.
ast.target: 切换列表中笔记标题的粗体字重。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the default sort order for pinned notes when the plugin is loaded. To change the order click on the PINNED NOTES title in the main view.
ast.target: 选择插件加载时置顶笔记的默认排序顺序。要更改顺序，请在主视图中点击“置顶笔记”标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Drag and drop the notes below to set your preferred manual order.
ast.target: 拖放下面的笔记以设置您首选的手动顺序。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to open assets when clicked from the Assets list.
ast.target: 选择从资源列表点击时如何打开资源。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the default layout for the assets tab.
ast.target: 选择资源标签页的默认布局。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How many days back the Assets tab should look for created or modified notes. Default is 120.
ast.target: 资源标签页应查找创建或修改笔记的回溯天数。默认为120。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A comma-separated list of file extensions to hide from the Assets tab and calendar dots (e.g., jpg,pdf,zip). Default is base,canvas.
ast.target: 要从资源标签页和日历点中隐藏的文件扩展名的逗号分隔列表（例如，jpg,pdf,zip）。默认为base,canvas。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show native OS notifications for alerting tasks (desktop only)
ast.target: 显示原生操作系统通知以提醒任务（仅限桌面端）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The format used for dates displayed in the task layout (e.g., YYYY-MM-DD, DD-MM-YYYY).
ast.target: 任务布局中显示日期所使用的格式（例如，YYYY-MM-DD、DD-MM-YYYY）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The font size for the date/tag group headings (e.g., 'Overdue', 'Today'). Default is 13px.
ast.target: 日期/标签组标题（例如，“逾期”、“今天”）的字体大小。默认为13px。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, long tasks will be shortened with '...'. If disabled, they will wrap to multiple lines.
ast.target: 如果启用，长任务将用'...'缩短。如果禁用，它们将换行到多行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Space between the checkbox and the task content.
ast.target: 复选框和任务内容之间的间距。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to group tasks in the view. Second-clicking the Tasks tab will also toggle this.
ast.target: 选择在视图中如何对任务进行分组。第二次点击任务标签页也会切换此设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the layout structure for tasks in the list.
ast.target: 选择列表中任务的布局结构。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 编辑您的自定义拖放配置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show tasks that you have marked as complete today.
ast.target: 显示您今天标记为已完成的任务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Force pause all goals immediately, regardless of schedule.
ast.target: 立即强制暂停所有目标，无论计划如何。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Deletes the current history and actively recalculates daily scores from your first task until today. This fixes missing history in charts.
ast.target: 删除当前历史记录，并从您的第一个任务到今天主动重新计算每日分数。这可以修复图表中缺失的历史记录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Clears stored vacation days for all goals. After resetting the scoring cache, past days will be recomputed without vacation applied.
ast.target: 清除所有目标存储的假期天数。重置评分缓存后，过去的日子将在不应用假期的情况下重新计算。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which dashboard to show by default.
ast.target: 选择默认显示哪个仪表板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For the "Date from note title" heatmap source. Provide a comma-separated list of formats to check for.
ast.target: 对于“来自笔记标题的日期”热力图源。提供要检查的格式的逗号分隔列表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle all widget names in the dashboard on/off. Custom widgets can override this.
ast.target: 切换仪表板中所有小部件名称的开/关。自定义小部件可以覆盖此设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle widget chevrons for expand/collapse in the dashboard. Custom widgets can override this.
ast.target: 切换仪表板中用于展开/折叠的小部件箭头。自定义小部件可以覆盖此设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the global setting and choose if this widget shows a title.
ast.target: 覆盖全局设置并选择此小部件是否显示标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which date to use for placing files on the heatmap.
ast.target: 选择用于在热力图上放置文件的日期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of past months to show in the grid (e.g., 11 for the last year).
ast.target: 在网格中显示的过去月份数（例如，11表示去年）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of future months to show in the grid.
ast.target: 在网格中显示的未来月份数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set a note to open when clicking the total count for this heatmap.
ast.target: 设置点击此热力图总计数时要打开的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how multiple rules are combined.
ast.target: 选择如何组合多个规则。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a new heatmap widget with custom filtering rules.
ast.target: 创建一个带有自定义过滤规则的新热力图小部件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Files in these folders will be ignored by this heatmap.
ast.target: 这些文件夹中的文件将被此热力图忽略。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will overwrite your current appearance settings with the previewed values.
ast.target: 这将用预览值覆盖您当前的外观设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Load settings from a JSON file. This will overwrite your current settings after confirmation.
ast.target: 从JSON文件加载设置。确认后，这将覆盖您当前的设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you find this plugin useful, please consider supporting its development. It's greatly appreciated!
ast.target: 如果您觉得这个插件有用，请考虑支持其开发。非常感谢！

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 按优先级为复选框着色

ast.target: 核心组件无法删除，请使用开关隐藏

ast.target: 将此文件夹添加到忽略列表

ast.target: 将所有任务组图标重置为原始值

ast.name: setTooltip

ast.target: 清除此指示器。这不会更改您的设置。

ast.target: 将所有插件设置保存到文件

ast.name: warn
ast.source: GoalTracker: Could not retrieve daily note settings
ast.target: GoalTracker：无法获取每日笔记设置

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [CPWN] Tasks plugin API not ready or vault has no tasks after startup timeout – rendering without tasks.
ast.target: [CPWN] 任务插件 API 未就绪或启动超时后保险库中无任务 – 正在无任务渲染。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No events found for this date, so nothing to inject.
ast.target: 此日期未找到事件，因此无需注入。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not create weekly note due to an internal error. Check console for details.
ast.target: 由于内部错误，无法创建周记。请检查控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Scratchpad path is invalid or could not be created.
ast.target: 草稿路径无效或无法创建。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 剪贴板中的颜色格式无效。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 自定义固定顺序已保存！

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 自定义布局已保存并应用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: All task group icons have been reset.
ast.target: 所有任务组图标已重置。

ast.name: Notice

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 重建历史记录出错。请检查控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vacation history cleared. Reset the scoring cache if you want past days recomputed without vacation.
ast.target: 假期历史记录已清除。如果您希望重新计算过去的日子（不包含假期），请重置评分缓存。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Blank widget added. Click "Configure" to set it up.
ast.target: 空白组件已添加。点击“配置”进行设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error: This does not appear to be a valid settings file.
ast.target: 错误：这似乎不是一个有效的设置文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error: Could not parse the JSON file. Ensure it is not corrupted.
ast.target: 错误：无法解析 JSON 文件。请确保文件未损坏。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Show tasks that have a due date before today and are not completed.
ast.target: 显示截止日期在今天之前且未完成的任务。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Show all tasks that have a due date of today.
ast.target: 显示所有截止日期为今天的任务。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Show all tasks that have a due date of tomorrow.
ast.target: 显示所有截止日期为明天的任务。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Show all tasks that are due after tomorrow and up to 7 days ahead
ast.target: 显示所有截止日期在明天之后且未来7天内的任务。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Show tasks that have a due date after the next 7 days out.
ast.target: 显示截止日期在接下来7天之后的任务。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Show all tasks that due not have a due date.
ast.target: 显示所有没有截止日期的任务。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Standard layout. Metadata aligned to the right.
ast.target: 标准布局。元数据右对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Standard layout. Tags moved to far right.
ast.target: 标准布局。标签移至最右侧。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Title slides left if no priority. Tags are justified to the far right.
ast.target: 若无优先级，标题左移。标签两端对齐至最右侧。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tight top section. Larger gap before tags.
ast.target: 紧凑的顶部区域。标签前有较大间距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Title top. Meta middle. Tags bottom. EVERYTHING LEFT ALIGNED.
ast.target: 标题在上。元数据居中。标签在下。所有内容左对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Pixel-perfect alignment for title and tags. Tags positioned on the last row. Alerts on the right.
ast.target: 标题和标签的像素级对齐。标签位于最后一行。警报在右侧。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tags appear before the title. Metadata floats right.
ast.target: 标签出现在标题之前。元数据右浮动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Good for narrow screens. Title on top, metadata below.
ast.target: 适用于窄屏幕。标题在上，元数据在下。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This plugin provides two comprehensive calendar views together with an integrated panel containing a scratchpad area, notes, tasks, and assets.
ast.target: 此插件提供两个全面的日历视图，以及一个集成面板，包含便签区、笔记、任务和资产。
